heading: National inventory and voluntary reporting of greenhouse gases
label: 13385 National inventory and voluntary reporting of greenhouse gases

children.heading: National inventory
children.label: a National inventory
children.text: Not later than one year after , the Secretary, through the Energy Information Administration, shall develop, based on data available to, and obtained by, the Energy Information Administration, an inventory of the national aggregate emissions of each greenhouse gas for each calendar year of the baseline period of 1987 through 1990. The Administrator of the Energy Information Administration shall annually update and analyze such inventory using available data. This subsection does not provide any new data collection authority.October 24, 1992

children.label: i
children.text: for the baseline period of 1987 through 1990; and

children.label: ii
children.text: for subsequent calendar years on an annual basis;

children.label: B
children.text: annual reductions of greenhouse gas emissions and carbon fixation achieved through any measures, including fuel switching, forest management practices, tree planting, use of renewable energy, manufacture or use of vehicles with reduced greenhouse gas emissions, appliance efficiency, energy efficiency, methane recovery, cogeneration, chlorofluorocarbon capture and replacement, and power plant heat rate improvement;

children.label: D
children.text: an aggregate calculation of greenhouse gas emissions by each reporting entity.

children.heading: Reporting procedures
children.label: 2 Reporting procedures
children.text: The Administrator of the Energy Information Administration shall develop forms for voluntary reporting under the guidelines established under paragraph (1), and shall make such forms available to entities wishing to report such information. Persons reporting under this subsection shall certify the accuracy of the information reported.

children.heading: Confidentiality
children.label: 3 Confidentiality
children.text: Trade secret and commercial or financial information that is privileged or confidential shall be protected as provided in .section 552(b)(4) of title 5

children.heading: Establishment of data base
children.label: 4 Establishment of data base
children.text: Not later than 18 months after , the Secretary, through the Administrator of the Energy Information Administration, shall establish a data base comprised of information voluntarily reported under this subsection. Such information may be used by the reporting entity to demonstrate achieved reductions of greenhouse gases.October 24, 1992

children.heading: Consultation
children.label: c Consultation
children.text: In carrying out this section, the Secretary shall consult, as appropriate, with the Administrator of the Environmental Protection Agency.
